description_long: This is a tube of Veet Creme Depilatorio Silk & Fresh, designed for personal care and hair removal. The tube is made of flexible plastic with a glossy finish and features a predominantly white, pink, and blue color scheme. The front displays the Veet logo, product name, and a wave graphic, while the back is densely covered with product information and instructions in small text. The cap is a dark, circular flip-top style, currently open, allowing access to the lotion inside. The tube is slightly translucent, revealing some of the product's contents and internal air gaps. The overall form is cylindrical with a flattened front and back, typical for squeeze-dispensed lotions.
description: A glossy, flexible plastic tube of Veet Silk & Fresh depilatory cream with a flip-top cap, featuring pink, blue, and white graphics and text.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tube's narrow profile and the open, circular flip-top cap facing forward.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying dense product information text and the open cap angled to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the tube's narrow edge visible and the cap at the base.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the Veet logo, product name, wave graphic, and the open flip-top cap.
